hero.title: Download for Windows
hero.subtitle: Native Windows desktop app with better hardware integration and performance. Use the same account as the web version.

cta.title: PharmaSaaS for Windows
cta.note: Free to download - Requires PharmaSaaS account

hardware.title: Better Hardware Integration
hardware.description: Direct connection to barcode scanners and thermal printers without browser limitations

performance.title: Faster Performance
performance.description: Native Windows app optimized for speed with local caching

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.description: Continue working even when internet connection is unstable (coming soon)

sync.title: Same Account and Data
sync.description: Log in with your existing account and all data syncs automatically

items.pos: Full POS system with barcode scanner support

download.title: Download
download.description: Download the Windows installer from this page

install.title: Install
install.description: Run the installer and follow the setup wizard

login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in with your existing PharmaSaaS account

account.question: Do I need a separate account?
account.answer: No. Use the same account for both web and desktop. Your data syncs automatically between them.

free.question: Is the desktop app free?
free.answer: Yes, the desktop app is free to download. You just need an active PharmaSaaS subscription.

both.question: Can I use both web and desktop?
both.answer: Absolutely. Use the web app on any device and the desktop app on your Windows PC. All data syncs in real time.

scanner.question: Will it work with my barcode scanner?
scanner.answer: Yes. The desktop app works with most USB barcode scanners and thermal receipt printers.
